title: angelica tenuifolia
intro: Angelica tenuifolia, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial effects. The health benefits of angelica tenuifolia include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other conditions related to women's health, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. Angelica tenuifolia can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
